subcodes.first_line: This is the Day whereon the Ancient Beauty hath established Himself upon the throne of His Most Great Name and hath summoned all unto the Most Exalted Horizon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا یوم فیه استقر جمال القدم علی عرش اسمه العظیم و دعا الکل الی الافق الاعلی
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @proclamation to the people of the world
